"**Menasha" Territorial Brigade** (also known as the **Jenin Brigade**) is a Territorial Brigade in the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces") whose role is to control law and order in the [Jenin](/wiki/Jenin "Jenin") and [Tulkarm](/wiki/Tulkarm "Tulkarm") sectors and to prevent terrorist attacks. The brigade is under the command of the [Judea and Samaria Division](/wiki/Judea_and_Samaria_Division "Judea and Samaria Division").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)
["The Twelve Tribes of Israel"](https://www.jewishvirtuallibrary.org/the-twelve-tribes-of-israel). *www.jewishvirtuallibrary.org*. Retrieved 2023-01-21.

Military unit

The **431st** "**Menasha" Territorial Brigade** (also known as the **Jenin Brigade**) is a Territorial Brigade in the [Israel Defense Forces](/wiki/Israel_Defense_Forces "Israel Defense Forces") whose role is to control law and order in the [Jenin](/wiki/Jenin "Jenin") and [Tulkarm](/wiki/Tulkarm "Tulkarm") sectors and to prevent terrorist attacks. The brigade is under the command of the [Judea and Samaria Division](/wiki/Judea_and_Samaria_Division "Judea and Samaria Division").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

## The name and emblem

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Menashe_Territorial_Brigade&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: The name and emblem")]

The brigade is named after the [tribe of Menashe](/wiki/Tribe_of_Manasseh "Tribe of Manasseh") which according to the [bible](/wiki/Hebrew_Bible "Hebrew Bible") was settled in the same area as the brigade.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

The Brigade's emblem is built out of 4 pieces: Blue and white lines, symbolizing the flag of Israel, the [Gilboa](/wiki/Mount_Gilboa "Mount Gilboa") mountain, A wall that symbolizes the [West Bank separation barrier](/wiki/Israeli_West_Bank_barrier "Israeli West Bank barrier") and the lion that represents the [Central Command](/wiki/Central_Command_(Israel) "Central Command (Israel)").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

## Headquarters

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Menashe_Territorial_Brigade&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Headquarters")]

The Headquarters of the unit is located in a military camp near [Ein Shemer](/wiki/Ein_Shemer "Ein Shemer").[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)

## Organization and purpose

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Menashe_Territorial_Brigade&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Organization and purpose")]

Unlike the other territorial divisions in the [West Bank](/wiki/West_Bank "West Bank"), the Menasha Division is not responsible for just one central Palestinian district, but for two: [Jenin](/wiki/Jenin "Jenin") and [Tulkarm](/wiki/Tulkarm "Tulkarm").[[1]](#cite_note-:0-1)

### Notable commanders

| Name | Period of service | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Yoav Gallant](/wiki/Yoav_Gallant "Yoav Gallant")[[4]](#cite_note-4) | 1993–1994 | Later served as commander of [Southern Command](/wiki/Southern_Command_(Israel) "Southern Command (Israel)") and [Minister of Defense](/wiki/Ministry_of_Defense_(Israel) "Ministry of Defense (Israel)") |
| [Herzi Halevi](/wiki/Herzi_Halevi "Herzi Halevi") | 2005–2007 | Later served as [Chief of the General Staff](/wiki/Chief_of_the_General_Staff_(Israel) "Chief of the General Staff (Israel)") |
| [Ghassan Alian](/wiki/Ghassan_Alian "Ghassan Alian") | 2011–2013 | Later served as commander of [COGAT](/wiki/Coordinator_of_Government_Activities_in_the_Territories "Coordinator of Government Activities in the Territories") |
| Hezi Nehama[[5]](#cite_note-5) | 2015–2017 | Later served as commander of [Alexandroni Brigade](/wiki/Alexandroni_Brigade "Alexandroni Brigade") |
| Yair Pali[[3]](#cite_note-:1-3)[*[better source needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability#Questionable_sources "Wikipedia:Verifiability")*] | 2019–2021 |  |

| Ayub Kayuf[[6]](#cite_note-6) | August 2023 - | The current commander of the brigade |
